latin: Lannister semper debita sua solvit. hoc promissum est, hoc minae sunt. aurum nostrum numquam deficit, nec memoria nostra.

questions.prompt: What does a Lannister always do?
What two things does the saying represent?

translation: A Lannister always pays their debts. This is a promise, this is a threat. Our gold never runs out, nor does our memory.
